ogTitle: Main Lead vs Maindample: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Main Lead and Maindample.
heading: Main Lead vs Maindample — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Main Lead, Victoria and Maindample, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Maindample has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Main Lead (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Main Lead or Maindample safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Main Lead has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Maindample scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Main Lead scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Maindample scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Main Lead or Maindample?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Maindample has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
